company.name: Microsoft (Israel)
company.notes: Major R&D. AI work. 2 LinkedIn contacts.

research.status_summary: Actively hiring (~100 open R&D roles as of March 2026, 580–609 Israel-listed jobs on LinkedIn/Glassdoor in June 2026), but under significant leadership and governance disruption following the firing of Country GM Alon Haimovich in May 2026 and an ongoing internal ethics probe.
research.hiring_policy: Microsoft Israel operates a hybrid model (3 days/week in-office at Herzliya/Tel Aviv/Haifa/Nazareth sites); roles are direct Microsoft employment—no EOR needed—but the company hires locally in Israel and does not typically sponsor non-local visa candidates for its Israel R&D center.
recent_news: May 2026: Country GM Alon Haimovich fired and several government-division managers exited following an internal ethics probe into Microsoft Israel's work with Israel's Ministry of Defense and IDF Unit 8200's use of Azure for surveillance of Palestinians.

May 2026: Microsoft Israel temporarily placed under the management of Microsoft France (previously reported to Dubai) while a new country GM is sought; the probe focused on non-transparent contract terms that exposed Microsoft to European regulatory/GDPR risk.

March 2026 (Calcalist): Microsoft Israel R&D (3,000 employees) was actively recruiting ~100 people in software development, research, and product management, with AI (Copilot capabilities) and cybersecurity as the primary focus areas—recruitment continued despite the governance controversy.

May 2026: Microsoft globally consolidated its consumer and enterprise Copilot teams under new leadership (Jacob Andreou), with Israel's Excel/AI Formula Completion team cited as a flagship local AI product.
June 2026: Microsoft preparing new MAI model family (image, voice, transcription, coding) for Build 2026 announcements, reinforcing Israel R&D center's AI pipeline relevance.
research.growth_signal: Headcount stable at ~3,000 in Israel with ~100 active R&D hires in progress, but leadership vacuum and governance probe introduce near-term uncertainty; the core AI and security product mandate remains intact and Microsoft's global AI model investment is accelerating.
research.fit_for_lior: Strong fit on Creative AI (Israel team built AI Formula Completion for Excel, Copilot AI features) and Product Analyst threads, though the leadership transition and ethics probe mean the government/defense sales side is turbulent—pure R&D/product roles in the Herzliya campus remain the most stable entry point.
